data.body:
=== HANDOFF: Jira-sync reconciler debug + fixes (session end, 2026-07-17/18) ===

ORIGINAL PROBLEM: "rebar tickets aren't syncing with Jira through the GitHub Actions reconciler."
FINDING: status/existence sync FINE (0 drift across ~1200 tickets). Real failures were in COMMENTS + INBOUND LINKS, hidden behind a reconciler that reports "converged / applied N of N" + exit 0 while sub-ops silently fail.

LANDED ON MAIN (all via Gerrit, require_authenticated=false rollback base):
- P1 (1f3d, CLOSED) a6cdad0e2: get_comments now paginates (--paginate + multi-page concatenated-object parse); + TRUNCATION GUARD in outbound_comments._diff_comments (bulk /search/jql embeds only 20/issue while total=5000 -> re-fetch full set when total>len). Live: get_comments(REB-155)=5000 (was 50); 0 re-posts.
- P2 (4b59, IN_PROGRESS - close after 778) e6f3283a0: inbound link direction inversion fixed in _diff_links_inbound + _diff_link_removals (outwardIssue Blocks->blocks, inwardIssue->depends_on, live-Jira truth REB-458/461); + inverse-aware CROSS-TICKET dedup (skip counterpart-owned edges; skip archived/absent counterparts). Live: 54 real tickets -> 0 emits.
- actionlint CI flake (4e99, CLOSED, NOT in epic) 98e95ab24: Makefile actionlint-bin now set -e + curl --retry (was masking failed download as 'installed' exit 0).

IN REVIEW (Gerrit change 778, branch fix/unify-link-direction in worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-jira-sync-fixes): completes the direction-logic unification (link_direction.py now SINGLE source of truth; outbound_links imports resolve_inbound_link; acli_graph dead _JIRA_LINK_TO_RELATION deleted). Poller bmhtn8luy watching. WHEN 778 MERGES -> `rebar transition 4b59-3bf9-d4a4-4768 in_progress closed --reason "Fixed: ..."`.

ANTI-CHRONIC-PATTERN (critical): history showed 3 prior link fixes shipped inverted because "proven" by ROUND-TRIP/consistency oracles (invariant under double inversion). New tests assert ABSOLUTE direction vs CAPTURED live-Jira fixtures (tests/fixtures/jira/live_ground_truth/REB-458+461). NEVER add a round-trip oracle. ALWAYS run the FULL default suite (make test / pytest -m "not integration and not external") before push (two CI misses came from running only the reconciler subset).

REMAINING (tickets under epic 58b0):
1. 778 lands -> close 4b59 -> close epic 58b0 (after all children).
2. Jira cleanup (bd80-0603-7d44-4d9f): purge duplicate comments on 13 capped tickets. AFTER P1 reaches the reconciler (reconcile-bridge installs from main each run). Backup + dry-run + human approval BEFORE deletion (irreversible). 13 tickets + safety plan in the ticket.
3. Observability (48c8-5375-f883-462d): gate comment_errors fatality behind RECONCILER_FAIL_SILENT_NOOP (default off, land safe); count comment_errors toward mutation_failures when flag on (apply_handlers.py ~195 + reconcile.py ~1051); comments/labels canary coverage (currently links-only). ACTIVATE flag (REBAR_RECONCILER_FAIL_SILENT_NOOP=1 in reconcile-bridge.yml) ONLY AFTER cleanup (else fails on capped-ticket comment errors).

ENV: JIRA_API_TOKEN in env; acli authed to navasage.atlassian.net (project REB). Gerrit push as RebarBotNava; commit-msg hook curl FAILS in this env -> add Change-Id manually (git hash-object). Full-suite has 3 local-env config-flakes (test_config_perf/show, CWD rebar.toml) that CI's env passes. Worktrees: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-jira-sync-fixes (venv, 778), /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-actionlint-fix (776 landed - can remove). backup branches: backup-jira-sync-stack2.
